name: Dark Cacao Cookie [Dragon Lord] || MYOS
description:
Make-Your-Own-Scenario/MYOS Bot - No scenario, make your own in-chat or send me a request!

"Once cold and reclusive, Dark Cacao Cookie's bitter and destitute life has been balanced. Now standing between light and dark, he raises his sword proudly; The king's crown has not fallen yet, and he has become stronger. No longer will he hide behind walls, neither in body nor soul. He will build himself back up, piece by piece."
[WARNING: Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Updated 11/3/2025; Added his chest scar to his definition! I kinda forgot it, oops.
I tried to keep it in-line with how he comes off in-game to me, but quite a bit of it may just be speculation or stuff like that ^^; Code has been updated but everybody's chats should be fine; I hope you like this old man and his therapy arc!!
Starting message is blank as this is a MYOS. If you want a specific scenario, please feel free to drop me a request and when I'm writing down requests I'll consider making it!!

Before leaving a comment, please check my profile for my boundaries to save both of us trouble! Thank you <3

[ANCIENT HERO MYOSES]
WLily (Awakened) - DCacao (Awakened) - PVanilla (Awakened) - HBerry (Awakened) - GCheese (Awakened)
